name: Nulo Prowess Sensitive Stomach Adult Cat Wet Food - Pate, 2.8 OZ
description: Nulo Prowess Sensitive Stomach Chicken & Duck Paté is precision–formulated by veterinarian & animal nutritionists to support digestive comfort with every bite–offering gentle, protein–rich nutrition for adult cats with sensitive systems. Featuring real chicken and duck, this smooth paté delivers high–quality animal protein and easily digestible ingredients like pumpkin and brown rice to support nutrient absorption and digestive ease. A tailored blend of functional fiber plus inulin, salmon oil, and antioxidant–rich cranberries and blueberries works together to help nourish gut health, promote regularity, and support immune function. With elevated moisture to support hydration and a soft, palatable texture, Sensitive Stomach Paté delivers science–led, gentle nutrition to help sensitive cats thrive. No Fillers. No Fluff.
benefits: Science–led, Veterinarian Formulated Cat Wet Nutrition for Sensitive Stomach - Developed by Veterinarian & Animal Nutritionists to support easy digestion & nutrient absorption with functional ingredients.

High–Protein Paté with Real Chicken & Duck - Made with real chicken and duck, easily digestible ingredients like pumpkin, a tailored blend of functional fiber, inulin, and salmon oil to help nourish gut health and promote regularity.
Precision Formulated for Whole–Body Health - Features 25 essential nutrients to support lean muscle mass, healthy skin and coat, heart function, and digestive balance.
Clean, Functional Ingredients Backed by Science - Made with real meat, taurine, and salmon oil to promote whole–body wellness - with no corn, gluten, wheat or soy.
Moisture–Rich Paté Supports Daily Hydration - Smooth, savory paté with added chicken broth helps increase water intake to support hydration for even the pickiest eaters.

name: Royal Canin® Veterinary Diet Feline Renal Support D Adult Cat Wet Food in Gravy  3 oz can
description: Help support your cat's overall wellness with Royal Canin Veterinary Diet Renal Support D Thin Slices in Gravy Canned Cat Food - a highly palatable wet cat food that is specially formulated to care for the kidney health of adult cats under veterinary supervision. "D" stands for Delectable, and this formula can help stimulate your cat's appetite. The energy-dense diet provides nutritional support in smaller portions, since cats with kidney challenges can have decreased appetites. Plus, this low phosphorus cat food contains a precise antioxidant complex, fatty acids from fish oil and targeted protein levels to help support kidney function. With over 50 years of scientific research and observation, Royal Canin continues to deliver targeted nutrition to feed every pet's magnificence. Mix this thin slices in gravy soft cat food with other Royal Canin Renal Support diets formulated for IRIS stage 2+ kidney disease, which have a variety of palatable aromas and dry or wet forms to help you find the right combination to get your cat eating again.

name: Royal Canin® Veterinary Diet Feline Renal Support T Adult Cat Wet Food in Gravy  3 oz can
description: Bring home the nutrition that your cat deserves with Royal Canin Veterinary Diet Renal Support T Thin Slices in Gravy Canned Cat Food - a highly palatable wet cat food that is specially formulated to care for the kidney health of adult cats under veterinary supervision. "T" stands for Tasty, and this formula can help stimulate your cat's appetite. The energy-dense diet provides nutritional support in smaller portions, since cats with kidney challenges can have decreased appetites. Plus, this low phosphorus cat food contains a precise antioxidant complex, fatty acids from fish oil and targeted protein levels to help support kidney function. With over 50 years of scientific research and observation, Royal Canin continues to deliver targeted nutrition to feed every pet's magnificence. Pair this thin slices in gravy soft cat food with other Royal Canin Renal Support diets formulated for cats with IRIS stage 2+ kidney disease, which have a variety of palatable aromas and dry or wet forms to help you find the right combination to get your cat eating again.

name: Tiki Cat Seafood Selects Cat Food Non-GMO, Natural, Variety Pack 36ct
description: The ultimate variety pack for cats! The Tiki Cat Fish Favorites Mega Pack is perfect for multi–cat households or those who simply prefer less shopping trips. Tiki Cat Fish Favorites Mega Pack features 36 servings of the high–protein, high–moisture nutrition cats need as carnivores. Delight your cat with a new fishy flavor at each meal! 18 servings are Tiki Cat Aloha Friends™ Recipes, which feature wild–caught ahi tuna as the first ingredient, plus pumpkin to aid digestion. Included Aloha Friends recipes are: (5) Tuna & Pumpkin Recipe in Broth, (5) Tuna, Shrimp & Pumpkin Recipe in Broth, (3) Tuna, Tilapia & Pumpkin Recipe in Broth, (3) Tuna, Ocean Whitefish & Pumpkin Recipe in Broth, (2) Tuna, Calamari & Pumpkin Recipe in Broth 18 servings are Tiki Cat Grill, indulgent seafood and fish recipes, with real flaked tuna, sardines, crab and prawn in a savory broth. Included Grill recipes are:(4) Ahi Tuna Recipe(4) Sardine Cutlets Recipe in Sardine Consomme, (2) Ahi Tuna & Prawns Recipe in Broth, (2) Mackerel & Sardines Recipe in Calamari Consomme, (2) Tuna & Crab Surimi Recipe, (2) Ahi Tuna & Crab Recipe in Broth, (2) Sardine Cutlets Recipe in Lobster Consomme. Tiki Cat is the carnivore diet cats were born to eat. As obligate carnivores, cat need meat, not plants. That's why Tiki Cat foods offer high protein nutrition from real animal protein sources, low-carbohydrates, and no grains. Cats also have a naturally low thirst drive, so Tiki Cat wet foods, treats and toppers are high moisture, offering supplemental hydration. With Tiki Cat, your carnivorous cat gets exactly what their body needs in the exciting flavors and textures they crave!
benefits: 36 high–protein meals with real flaked fish as the first ingredients.
High–moisture broth gives cats the supplemental hydration they need.
Grain free and potato free, because cats are carnivores. 100% non–GMO ingredients.
Complete and balanced for cats of all ages.

name: Royal Canin® Feline Health Nutrition Kitten Thin Slices in Gravy Wet Cat Food - 3 oz can, 12 count
description: Royal Canin Kitten Thin Slices in Gravy Cat Food is specifically designed to support a young kitten's growth and development up to 12 months. The precise ratio of proteins, fats, and carbohydrates matches the instinctively preferred macronutrient profile of your kitten, supporting their high energy needs. Clinically proven antioxidants, including vitamins E and C, help support the healthy development of immune systems. An adapted level of protein, vitamins, and minerals supports your kitten's growing bones and muscles. A combination of prebiotic and highly digestible proteins helps promote digestive health for this final stage of kittenhood. And the tasty, soft texture is easy for a growing kitten's new teeth to chew. Keep them on this wet cat food until they reach 1 year old, regardless of size, then switch to Royal Canin Feline Care Nutrition Adult Cat Food for continued healthy development.

name: Wellness® Complete Health Adult Cat Wet Food - Seafood Pate, Variety Pack
description: Wellness Complete Health Natural Grain Free Wet Cat Food Variety Pate Recipes are healthy, natural cat foods for adult cats with excellent sources of protein and essential fatty acids for complete and balanced nutrition. They're made with high quality proteins and include other key ingredients like flaxseed and carrots, essential vitamins and minerals, and cranberries which are added to help maintain proper urinary tract health. In addition, hydration is extremely important to a cat's overall health and since cats do not have a strong thirst drive, Wellness Complete Health wet canned cat food recipes are a delicious and healthy way to increase your cat's moisture intake.
benefits: COMPLETE AND BALANCED NUTRITION: Grain free and rich with delicious premium proteins combined with essential vitamins and minerals, this variety pack includes 8 each of our Pate Chicken and Herring, Turkey and Salmon, and Chicken and Lobster recipes

SUPERIOR INGREDIENTS: All of our wet cat food recipes include lean meats, healthy fats, fruits and veggies with no wheat, corn or soy, and no added artificial flavors, colors, carrageenan or preservatives

HEALTHY HYDRATION: Hydration is extremely important to a cat's overall well-being and since cats do not have a strong thirst drive, this recipe is an easy way to increase your cat's moisture intake for urinary tract health

A LIFETIME OF WELLBEING: Each of our recipes is crafted to promote the signs of wellbeing - plenty of energy, a lustrous skin and coat, sound digestion and immunity, plus strong teeth and healthy eyes

WELLNESS NUTRITION: Created by nutritionists, veterinarians and animal lovers, our recipes provide an ideal balance of nature's finest ingredients, carefully selected to nourish and sustain your pet's well-being

description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Royal Canin® Veterinary Diet Urinary SO Moderate Calorie Adult Cat Wet Food in Gravy  3 oz can
description: Delight your cat with each delicious serving of Royal Canin Veterinary Diet Adult Urinary SO Moderate Calorie Morsels in Gravy Canned Cat Food - a veterinary-exclusive wet food for cats developed to nutritionally support your adult cat's urinary tract and bladder health. This wet cat food promotes a urinary environment unfavorable to the formation of both struvite and calcium oxalate crystals. It also helps increase the amount of urine your cat produces to help dilute excess minerals that can cause certain crystals and stones. Plus, moderate calorie content helps them maintain a healthy weight. By using Relative Super Saturation (RSS) methodology, this wet cat food gravy helps lower ion concentration in urine, which contributes to stone formation. Lower urinary tract issues may be a recurring concern for some cats. Talk to your veterinarian about keeping your cat on this urinary cat food for long-term urinary support. With over 50 years of scientific research and observation, Royal Canin continues to deliver targeted nutrition to feed every pet's magnificence. Ask your veterinarian about the right Royal Canin dry cat food and treats to complement your cat's diet.
benefits: Royal Canin Urinary SO Wet Cat Food for cats with urinary concerns and a tendency to gain weight
This formula helps dissolve pure struvite stones and prevent calcium oxalate stones
With moderate calorie content, this gravy cat food is ideal for weight maintenance
Lowers the risk of crystal formation using RSS methodology for bladder health
An exclusive S/O Index helps support urinary health by helping minimize crystal formation
Ask your veterinarian about the right Royal Canin dry cat food and treats to complement their diet
Check out the full range of Royal Canin wet and dry cat food formulas that offer nutrition for cats of all lifestages, activity levels and select breeds
Check out the full range of Royal Canin cat food for cats of all ages, lifestyles and sensitivities

name: Purina Pro Plan Hairball Adult Wet Cat Food - Variety Pack, 24 CT, 72 OZ
description: Delight your feline with three tasty varieties of hairball control cat food when you bring home a Purina Pro Plan SPECIALIZED Hairball wet cat food variety pack. Every high protein entree with natural fiber in this 24-can pack helps maintain lean muscle mass. Made with real salmon, whitefish and tuna, or chicken, each hairball cat food formula delivers a great taste cats love. She's sure to relish her meals when you rotate the Purina Pro Plan SPECIALIZED Hairball Salmon Entree, Hairball Ocean Whitefish & Tuna Entree and our Hairball Chicken Entree formulas. We craft this delicious cat food with no artificial colors or preservatives to meet your ingredient preferences. Even better, antioxidants in our cat food for hairball control support a healthy immune system, and vitamin A and taurine, an amino acid, support your cat's healthy vision. Nourish your adult cat with the 100 percent complete and balanced, focused nutrition in this hairball control wet cat food made with 25 essential vitamins and minerals.

name: Hill's® Science Diet® Adult Wet Cat Food - Urinary Hairball Control Entree, 2.9 oz
description: No one likes hairballs - especially your adult cat. That's why Hill's Science Diet Adult Urinary Hairball Control Savory Chicken Entree wet cat food provides nutrition to help avoid hairball formation for adult cats. This cat food made with natural ingredients uses optimized levels of magnesium to support a grown cat's entire urinary system - from kidneys to bladder - while easily digestible natural fibers comfortably reduce hairball issues. The real chicken gives your cat quality protein for muscle maintenance, and this canned food also provides omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids to nourish the skin and fur. There's more to love with the new look of Science Diet.

High-quality protein to help your senior cat maintain muscle.

name: Hill's® Prescription Diet® k/d Kidney Care Cat Food - Tuna
description: Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Kidney Care with Tuna Canned Cat Food filters waste and toxins from the blood, and maintains the normal balance of fluid and minerals within the body. As pets are getting older, damage to kidney tissues may occur. This process is irreversible, and will lead to further loss of kidney function. Renal cats may also experience loss of appetite and their caloric intake might decline, which may lead eventually to loss of muscle mass. Hill's nutritionists and veterinarians developed Prescription Diet k/d, clinical nutrition to support your cat's kidney function and help sustain muscle mass. In fact, the nutrition of k/d is clinically tested nutrition to improve & lengthen quality of life.
benefits: Hill's Prescription Diet k/d Feline is a complete and balanced food that provides all the nutrition your cat needs. Please consult your veterinarian for further information on how our Prescription Diet foods can help your cat to continue to enjoy a happy and active life.

name: Royal Canin® Feline Care Nutrition Urinary Care Adult Cat Wet Food, 12-ct
description: To support your adult cat's urinary health, Royal Canin Feline Urinary Care Adult Wet Cat Food delivers a highly palatable thin slices in gravy soft cat food to help maintain urinary tract health in healthy cats. This adult cat food is formulated to efficiently promote a healthy mineral content in their urine in only 10 days. Complete and balanced nutrition, this wet food is precisely balanced to support urinary health by maintaining the mineral balance in your cat's urine. It uses a unique methodology to assess the impact a diet has on lower urinary tract health. Along with a cat food for urinary tract health, remember to monitor your cat's water intake and always consult your veterinarian if you have any concerns.

name: Royal Canin® Feline Care Nutrition Kitten Loaf in Sauce Wet Food  5.1 oz can
description: With so many kitten food options out there, how do you know what's best for yours? At four months old, a kitten's growth rate changes. Their rising energy levels, developing immune and digestive systems, growing bones and muscles, and emerging teeth mean older kittens have different needs than they did as a baby cat (1-4 months old). Royal Canin Kitten Loaf in Sauce Wet Food delivers the nutritional precision your kitten needs to reach their most magnificent potential. This wet food's easy-to-chew soft loaf texture is the perfect complement to Royal Canin Dry Food as your kitten transitions to a more "grown-up" diet of solids. Backed by nearly 50 years of obsessive research and expertise, Royal Canin continues to innovate pet nutrition. This carefully crafted diet is made with the essential nutrients kittens need to reach their most magnificent potential.

name: Tiki Cat After Dark Adult Wet Cat Food Variety Pack - High Protein, Soft Pate, 12 CT 36 Oz
description: Cats know the best hunting happens after dark. Awaken your cat's instinctual desires with Tiki Cat After Dark Pate. directions: We recommend at least a 7-day transition before you begin feeding the new food exclusively. Start by mixing 75% of the old diet with 25% of the new diet on Day 1 and Day 2. This allows your pet's digestive system to smoothly adapt to the new food.

name: Applaws Wet Cat Food - Natural, Limited Ingredient, 5.5 oz
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet catfood can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating apositive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

description: Royal Canin Feline Urinary Care Thin Slices in Gravy Wet Cat Food delivers a highly palatable thin slices in gravy soft cat food to help maintain urinary tract health in healthy cats. description: Created with your cat's weight management in mind, Royal Canin Feline Weight Care Thin Slices in Gravy Canned Adult Wet Cat Food helps slightly overweight cats achieve a healthy weight in a delicious soft, wet formula. With a precise balance of vitamins and minerals, it can help maintain optimal health and wellness. To enhance mealtime palatability, this wet cat food can be paired with Weight Care dry kibble. Over 90% of slightly overweight cats fed Royal Canin Feline Weight Care Thin Slices in Gravy Canned Adult Wet Cat Food lost weight within two months. Royal Canin Feline Weight Care Thin Slices in Gravy Canned Adult Wet Cat Food is formulated for cats with a body condition score of 4, 5, or 6 out of 9, to help support muscle mass and a more ideal body condition. If you need to schedule your cat's yearly annual exam, you're concerned that she may have a body condition score of 7 out of 9 or above, or you have any other questions about her health, consult your veterinarian.

name: SHEBA Perfect Portions Gravy Indulgence - Salmon, White Fish, 31.7 OZ
description: Appeal to your cat's love of gravy with Sheba Gravy Indulgence Chicken Entree in Extra Gravy and Beef Entree in Extra Gravy Variety Pack. With added moisture to keep your cat hydrated, this gourmet wet cat food is made with extra gravy when compared to Sheba Perfect Portions Cuts in Gravy. Made with real meat, this is perfect for picky eaters because they'll enjoy the cuts of beef covered in a thick, delicious gravy for a protein-rich meal with irresistible flavors in a variety of textures. Easy-to-peel twin packs allow you to deliver your cat a gourmet serving every time without messy leftovers. Feel confident feeding your adult cat a complete and balanced meal for all life stages that is formulated without grains, corn, or soy and contains no by-products or fillers, and no artificial flavors, although trace amounts may be present due to cross-contact during manufacturing. Made in the USA with the finest ingredients from around the world, give your feline the nutrient-rich, wet cat food with extra gravy they want and deserve with Sheba Gravy Indulgence Chicken Entree in Extra Gravy and Beef Entree in Extra Gravy Variety Pack.
benefits: Extra Gravy, Extra Love: With added moisture to keep your cat hydrated, Sheba Gravy Indulgence Wet Cat Food delivers 70% gravy to 30% chunk, serving up extra gravy when compared to Sheba Perfect Portions Cuts in Gravy.

Perfect For Picky Eaters: Made with real meat, Sheba Gravy Indulgence features cuts of salmon or white fish covered in a thick, decadent gravy for a protein-rich meal with irresistible flavors in a variety of textures.
Complete and Balanced for All Life Stages: Sheba Gravy Indulgence Adult Wet Cat Food contains essential vitamins and minerals to help support overall health.

A Fresh Meal With Every Peel: These easy-to-serve twin packs of wet cat food ensure two gourmet servings at every meal with zero messy leftovers - just snap, peel, and serve. What Cats Want: Sheba Gravy Indulgence contains healthy fats & fatty acids and is made with essential amino acids.

Quality Ingredients: Sheba Perfect Portions Wet Cat Food is formulated without grains, corn, or soy, and contains no by-products or fillers, and no artificial flavors, although trace amounts may be present due to cross-contact during manufacturing.

12-Count: Contains twelve (12) twin-pack trays (48 servings total) of Sheba Gravy Indulgence Adult Wet Cat Food - twelve (6) Salmon Entree in Extra Gravy and twelve (6) White Fish Entree in Extra Gravy.

name: Sheba® Perfect Portions Adult Wet Cat Food - Cuts in Gravy, Variety Pack, 12 CT, 31.7 OZ
description: Cats know what they want - the delicious taste of Sheba Perfect Portions Cuts In Gravy wet cat food. Made with real meat, the succulent cuts of roasted chicken or tender turkey in a delicious gravy deliver a wet cat food your feline will love. With added moisture to keep your cat hydrated, this nutrient-rich cat food is made with essential amino acids and contains healthy fats & fatty acids. Perfect for picky eaters, Sheba Perfect Portions Wet Cat Food has two convenient, portioned trays for a delicious serving with zero messy leftovers every time. Sheba Wet Cat Food is formulated without corn, or soy, and no artificial flavors; although trace amounts may be present due to cross-contact during manufacturing. Your favorite feline is sure to enjoy this delightful cat food that supports a healthy immune system. Savor every delicious moment with Sheba Perfect Portions Wet Cat Food Cuts in Gravy.

name: Applaws Wet Cat Food - Natural, Grain Free, Limited Ingredient
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Tiki Cat® Chicken Craves Adult Cat Wet Food - Non-GMO, Variety Pack, 36ct
description: The ultimate variety pack for cats! The Tiki Cat Chicken Craves Mega Pack is perfect for multi–cat households or those who simply prefer less shopping trips. Tiki Cat Chicken Craves Mega Pack features 36 servings of the high–protein, high–moisture nutrition cats need as carnivores. Delight your cat with a delicious new flavor at each meal! 20 servings are Tiki Cat After Dark™ recipes, which feature real shredded chicken as the first ingredient, plus nutrient–dense, flavorful organ meats. Included After Dark recipes are: (4) Chicken Recipe in Broth, (4) Chicken & Lamb Recipe in Broth, (4) Chicken & Duck Recipe in Broth, (4) Chicken & Quail Recipe in Broth, (4) Chicken & Beef Recipe in Broth. 16 servings are Tiki Cat Luau™ recipes, with real shredded chicken in savory consomme. Included Luau recipes are: (6) Puka Puka Succulent Chicken Recipe in Chicken Consomme, (6) Koolina Chicken & Egg Recipe in Chicken Consomme, (4) Napili Wild Salmon & Chicken Recipe in Chicken Consomme. Tiki Cat is the carnivore diet cats were born to eat. As obligate carnivores, cat need meat, not plants. That's why Tiki Cat foods offer high protein nutrition from real animal protein sources, low-carbohydrates, and no grains. Cats also have a naturally low thirst drive, so Tiki Cat wet foods, treats and toppers are high moisture, offering supplemental hydration. With Tiki Cat, your carnivorous cat gets exactly what their body needs in the exciting flavors and textures they crave!

name: Hill's® Prescription Diet® i/d Digestive Care Cat Food - Chicken & Vegetable Stew
description: Hill's Prescription Diet i/d Wet Adult Cat Food is highly digestible, great–tasting nutrition, clinically shown to help resolve diarrhea and support recovery. This formula supports healing of the gastrointestinal tract and is specially formulated for cats with acute diarrhea, constipation, pancreatitis, chronic enteropathies, or other conditions requiring a highly digestible diet. Formulated with Hill's breakthrough ActivBiome+ Digestion proprietary blend of prebiotic fibers, which is clinically shown to activate the gut microbiome to support digestive health and promote healthy stool. It can be fed long–term to patients requiring a highly digestible food. For optimal recovery from acute GI disease, it is recommended to feed this food for at least 7 days.
benefits: • Hill's Prescription Diet i/d Wet Adult Cat Food is specially formulated by Hill's nutritionists and veterinarians to support cats' digestivehealth. • Nutrition clinically shown to help settle digestive upsets and improve stool quality in adult cats. • Highly digestible formula to support easy nutrient absorption. • Made with Activ Biome+ Digestion, a proprietary blend of prebiotic fibers shown to rapidly activate the gut microbiome to support digestive health and well–being. • High levels of B vitamins and added electrolytes help replace lost nutrients from digestive upset. • Clinically proven antioxidants support a healthy immune system. • Omega–3 & 6 fatty acids support healthy skin and luxurious fur. • S+OXSHIELD: Formulated to promote a urinary environment that reduces the risk of developing struvite and calcium oxalate crystals. • Hill's Prescription Diet is the #1 US Vet Recommended therapeutic pet food – consult with your vet to make sure Prescription Diet i/d is the right food for your cat.

name: Hill's® Prescription Diet® i/d Digestive Care Cat Food - Chicken
description: Hill's Prescription Diet i/d Wet Adult Cat Food is highly digestible, great–tasting nutrition, clinically shown to help resolve diarrhea and support recovery. This formula supports healing of the gastrointestinal tract and is specially formulated for cats with acute diarrhea, constipation, pancreatitis, chronic enteropathies, or other conditions requiring a highly digestible diet. Formulated with Hill's breakthrough ActivBiome+ Digestion proprietary blend of prebiotic fibers, which is clinically shown to activate the gut microbiome to support digestive health and promote healthy stool. It can be fed long–term to patients requiring a highly digestible food. For optimal recovery from acute GI disease, it is recommended to feed this food for at least 7 days.
benefits: • Hill's Prescription Diet i/d Wet Adult Cat Food is specially formulated by Hill's nutritionists and veterinarians to support cats' digestivehealth. • Nutrition clinically shown to help settle digestive upsets and improve stool quality in adult cats. • Highly digestible formula to support easy nutrient absorption. • Made with Activ Biome+ Digestion, a proprietary blend of prebiotic fibers shown to rapidly activate the gut microbiome to support digestive health and well–being. • High levels of B vitamins and added electrolytes help replace lost nutrients from digestive upset. • Clinically proven antioxidants support a healthy immune system. • Omega–3 & 6 fatty acids support healthy skin and luxurious fur. • S+OXSHIELD: Formulated to promote a urinary environment that reduces the risk of developing struvite and calcium oxalate crystals • Hill's Prescription Diet is the #1 US Vet Recommended therapeutic pet food – consult with your vet to make sure Prescription Diet i/d is the right food for your cat.

which is clinically shown to activate the gut microbiome to support digestive health and promote healthy stool. Hill's Prescription Diet i/d Wet Adult Cat Food is specially formulated to support digestive health and meets the unique nutritional needs of adult cats.

description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positiveimpact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

directions: Royal Canin recommends at least a 7-day transition before you begin feeding the new food exclusively. Start by mixing 75% of the old diet with 25% of the new diet on Day 1 and Day 2. On Day 3 and Day 4, mix 50% of the old diet with 50% of the new diet. On Day 5 and Day 6, mix 25% of the old diet with 75% of the new diet. On the 7th day, you can feed the new food exclusively. This allows your pet's digestive system to smoothly adapt to the new food.

name: Royal Canin® Feline Health Nutrition Mother & Babycat Mousse in Sauce Wet Cat Food  5.1 oz can
description: Royal Canin Mother & Babycat Ultra-Soft Mousse in Sauce feeds your young kitten's magnificence from the very start with the building blocks needed for healthy growth for months 1 to 4 starting during weaning: This baby cat food is a tailor-made nutritional solution that supports the high energy needs of queen cats at the end of gestation and during lactation, and the development of newborn kittens during the first stage of growth. Clinically proven antioxidants, including vitamins E and C, help support the healthy development of immune systems. The canned kitten food ultra-soft mousse texture facilitates the transition from milk to solid food for newborn kittens and their baby teeth. Plus, a combination of prebiotics and highly digestible proteins helps promote a healthy balance of intestinal microbiota for digestive health. A kitten is a kitten for 12 months, no matter their size. Feed this formula for months 1 to 4, then switch your kitten to Royal Canin Feline Health Nutrition Kitten food for continued healthy growth.
benefits: SUPPORTS MOTHER & BABYCAT HEALTH: Royal Canin Mother & Babycat Ultra Soft Mousse in Sauce Canned Cat Food is a unique nutritional solution that supports mother cats (pregnant or nursing), and the healthy growth and development of newborn kittens (1-4 months)
STRONG IMMUNE SYSTEM: An innovative blend of clinically proven antioxidants, including vitamins E and C, helps support the healthy development of your kittenâs immune system

IDEAL STARTER FOOD FOR KITTENS: Ultra soft mousse texture is easy to eat for baby teeth and facilitates the transition from milk to solid food for newborn baby kittens, making it a perfect complement to Mother & Babycat Dry Cat Food
MICROBIOME SUPPORT: The combination of prebiotics and highly digestible proteins helps promote a healthy balance of intestinal bacteria for digestive health
HEALTHY FOUNDATION: A kitten is a kitten for 12 months, no matter their size; keeping them on this formula from 1 to 4 months (after weaning) helps set up a healthy foundation for kittenhood

name: Applaws Adult Cat Food in Broth - With Grain, Fish, 2.47 oz Variety Pack
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet catfood can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating apositive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.
benefits: Limited, Nourishing Ingredients: Limited ingredient food your cat will love. Natural Goodness: We only put in the good stuff! Applaws wet cat food is 100% natural.
Protein Packed: Packed with real protein to fuel your cat's natural cravings!
Feed Their Curiosity: Make every mealtime an adventure, mix it up with a variety of exciting cat food tastes and textures such as broth, gravy, or mousse.
Happy, Healthy Cats: Our recipes are simple, and contain no artificial preservatives, colors, or flavors.
Complementary Cat Food: Feed as a Complement to any dry cat food for a complete and balanced diet.

description: To support your adult cat's urinary health, Royal Canin Feline Urinary Care Adult Wet Cat Food delivers a highly palatable thin slices in gravy soft cat food to help maintain urinary tract health in healthy cats. Complete and balanced nutrition, this wet food is precisely balanced to support urinary health by maintaining the mineral balance in your cat's urine. Along with a cat food for urinary tract health, remember to monitor your cat's water intake and always consult your veterinarian if you have any concerns.

name: Reveal Limited Ingredient All Life Stage Wet Cat Food in Gravy - Grain Free, 2.47 oz, 12 Count
description: At Reveal, we believe that our pets deserve better, healthier food that tastes great. You can trust the simplicity and goodness of food that contains natural ingredients. With real, rich protein as the first ingredient, Reveal offers a feast for even the fussiest of felines. Our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. Everyone knows that good nutrition starts with great ingredients, and you'll find only the best in Reveal. Reveal natural wet cat food pots, pouches and cans are carefully crafted with your cat's health in mind. Every portion of Reveal is made with real protein in a variety of textures and flavors to cater to your cat's mealtime preferences. There are endless mealtime possibilities with Reveal. Whether a hydrating broth, savory gravy, crunchy treat, or juicy loin. A flavor of fish, poultry, or both, your cat will love the simple, natural taste ofReveal. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. You can truly feel confident in your cat food choice with Reveal. At Reveal, we are dedicated to providing your feline friend with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Made by Nacho Minced Variety Pack - Grain Free, 12 Ct, 66 Oz
description: With three Nacho-approved recipes to choose from - Minced Turkey & Turkey Liver, Minced Chicken & Herring, and Minced Salmon & Sole - this wet cat food collection is sure to make pickiness a thing of the past. Hydrating bone broth (Nacho's signature ingredient) adds concentrated protein and a burst of flavor to every bite. Founded by Nacho Flay, a super fluffy orange Maine Coon cat, and his dad, Chef Bobby Flay. Made by Nacho is made for cats, by a cat. After years of watching his dad use only the best ingredients for his recipes, Nacho realized his cat food didn't measure up. That was his a-ha moment: Cats deserve more out of their food than they were getting - and Nacho was the cat to change all that. So Nacho and Bobby got to cooking and got some help from the best in the biz - like his lifelong vet, Dr. Katja Lang, who knows her stuff. Thousands of taste tests later, Made by Nacho was born. Made by Nacho is on a mission to set a new standard in cat care, giving cats everything they need to lead full, nourished lives. For us, that starts in the kitchen. We use a culinary approach for our cat-crafted cat food, starting with no-compromise, premium proteins like cage-free chicken, grass-fed, grain-finished beef, and sustainably caught salmon. In addition, we include grains for energy and Nacho's secret ingredient: savory bone broth to take each meal the extra mile. Each Made by Nacho recipe pairs the flavors and textures cats crave with the chef-inspired quality they deserve.

name: Applaws Adult Cat Food in Broth - With Grain, 5.5 oz Variety Pack
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them- whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positiveimpact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Our wet catfood can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating apositive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Royal Canin Mother & Baby Cat Mixed Feeding Kit - Wet and Dry Kit
description: Baby cats grow so quickly that some kitten foods aren't tailored to their nutritional needs. With growing bones, emerging teeth, and developing immune and digestive systems, it's critical they receive precise nutrition developed for their life stage. Royal Canin Mother & Babycat Dry Kibble and Ultra-Soft Mousse in Sauce feed your kitten's magnificence from the start with the essential building block nutrients needed for healthy growth. Feed alone or find the perfect balance with a dry and wet mixed feeding routine.
benefits: Formulated for the specific needs of growing baby kittens (1-4 months) and mother cats (pregnant or nursing).
Small, easy-to-chew dry kibble and fluffy mouse texture in sauce makes it easy to eat and helps a baby cat transition from milk to solid food.
Supports a young kitten's immune system with an exclusive complex of antioxidants and vitamins needed to stay healthy and grow strong.

Promotes healthy digestive system development with highly digestible proteins and prebiotics. Includes DHA to build a strong foundation for brain development, starting in the womb and continuing throughout the mother cat.

name: Royal Canin Mother & Babycat Dry and Wet Food Starter Kit - 1.8 Lb
description: Royal Canin Kitten Thin Slices in Gravy and Dry Kitten Food make it simple to feed a deliciously satisfying and nutritionally tailored combination of wet and dry foods, right from the start. Royal Canin Cat Food promotes healthy development and supports your kitten's growing bones and muscles. An exclusive combination of adapted protein, vitamin, and mineral levels helps support their rising energy needs for this final stage of kittenhood between 4 months and 1 year old. Clinically proven antioxidants, including vitamins E and C, help support the healthy development of immune systems. Tailor-made with a tasty chunk size and texture, the wet food is adapted for a growing kitten's baby teeth, while the dry kitten food contains prebiotics that help promote a healthy balance of intestinal microbiota for digestive health. Keep kittens on this wet and dry cat food combination until 12 months regardless of size. Then switch to Royal Canin Feline Care Nutrition Adult Cat Food for continued healthy development.
benefits: HEALTHY GROWTH: Royal Canin Kitten Thin Slices in Gravy and Dry Kitten Food have an adapted level of protein, vitamins, and minerals that supports the rising energy levels and growing bones and muscles of your kitten, from 4 months until 1 year old
STRONG IMMUNE SYSTEM: An exclusive blend of clinically proven antioxidants, including vitamins E and C, helps support the healthy development of your kitten's immune system
DESIGNED FOR BABY TEETH: Both the soft wet kitten food and dry kitten food are tailor-made with a tasty chunk size and texture adapted for growing kittens
MICROBIOME SUPPORT: Dry kitten food has a combination of prebiotics and highly digestible proteins that helps promote a healthy balance of intestinal bacteria for digestive health

name: Wellness® Purrfect Duos Adult Cat Wet Food - Natural, Grain Free, Variety Pack, 12 Ct, 31.68 Oz
description: Make mealtime easy and satisfying with Wellness® Purrfect Duos™ Split & Serve Variety Pack -perfectly portioned, mess-free meals crafted to please. This variety pack features three craveworthy recipes: Tuna & Salmon Pate, Chicken & Tuna Cuts in Gravy, and Chicken & Turkey Liver Cuts in Gravy. Each dual-compartment cup contains two savory servings made with real protein as the #1 ingredient - just split, serve, and enjoy! These grain-free recipes are crafted with high-quality ingredients and contain no added artificial flavors, colors, preservatives, or carrageenan- just a mouthwatering taste even picky cats will love. Purrfect Duos™ provide complete and balanced nutrition for adult cats, supporting peak performance and overall wellbeing. Each moisture-rich meal helps maintain daily hydration, essential for your cat's vitality. Backed by veterinarians, our recipes are designed to support the 5 Signs of Wellbeing™: Sustained Energy, Highly Digestible, Healthy Skin & Coat, Immune Health, and Healthy Teeth & Bones*. With over 90 Wellness® recipes to mix and match, you can build the perfect mealtime routine your cat will crave.*Survey of U.S. Veterinarians. Data on file.

name: Applaws Cat - Gravy, Fish, Variety Pack, 12 CT, 66 OZ
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positiveimpact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Sheba® Perfect Portions Adult Cat Wet Food - Pate, Chicken & Salmon Variety Pack
description: Cats know what they want - the delicious taste of Sheba Perfect Portions Pate. This wet cat food is made with real poultry or seafood for a protein-rich meal with irresistible flavors in a variety of texture. These savory pate cat food recipes contain savory chicken or with sustainable salmon. Sheba Perfect Portions Wet Cat Food has two convenient, portioned trays for a delicious serving every time. With added moisture to keep your cat hydrated, this wet cat food contains no corn, or soy, and no artificial flavors; although trace amounts may be present due to cross-contact during manufacturing. Perfect for picky eaters, this wet cat food pate contains healthy fats and is made with essential amino acids. We believe that truly irresistible wet cat food comes not just from expert preparation but from select ingredients that are sourced with care. Therefore, the Sheba brand is committed to sustainably sourced fish in its recipes. Visit sheba.com/sustainabilityfor details.
benefits: What Cats Want: Sheba Perfect Portions Pate Wet Cat Food is a nutrient-rich premium, delicious meal formulated for adult cat maintenance.

Perfect Portions: These easy-to-serve twin packs of wet cat food ensure two gourmet servings at every meal with zero messy leftovers - just snap, peel, and serve.
Quality Ingredients: Made in the USA with the finest ingredients from around the world, Sheba Perfect Portions Pate is complete and balanced for all life stages.

name: Applaws Fish Selection in Gravy Cat Food - Grain Free, Variety Pack, 8 Ct
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet catfood can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating apositive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

description: Wellness® Appetizing Entrées™ Shredded Chicken Recipe features mouthwatering meals cats crave. Made in the USA with global ingredients you can trust, this delicious wet food provides the precise nutrition required for a long, happy life. Whether you are looking to help a cat lose weight or simply maintain their current healthy size, this biology-based formula delivers the results pets deserve.

name: Applaws Adult Cat Wet Food - Mousse, Variety Pack, 24 Ct
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds & even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind & we want to satisfy their curious nature & ever–changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious s on our menu, we've got just the dish for them– whatever their personality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy & healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, & flavors & all s are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors & textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs & wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy & active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! A Taste Adventure for Every Cat are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible & ethical business. We believe in creating a positive impact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets & Planet.

name: Applaws Cat - Gravy, Chicken & Tuna, 2.47 OZ
description: Welcome to Applaws. The home of adventurous minds and even more adventurous appetites. Your cat is one of a kind and we want to satisfy their curious nature and ever-changing taste buds. With a variety of naturally delicious recipes on our menu, we've got just the dish for them - whatever their purrsonality! At Applaws, we believe happiness is natural. A happy and healthy cat starts with food made from the highest quality ingredients, we only put in the good stuff! Deliciously natural, our food is free from artificial preservatives, colors, and flavors and all recipes are made with 100% natural, limited ingredients. With high quality protein always the first ingredient, your cat's natural cravings will be met! Feed your cat's curiosity with textures like savory gravy, hydrating broth, or creamy mousse. Mix it up from poultry to fish. With a variety of flavors and textures to choose from, each mealtime is its own adventure with Applaws. Our wet cat food can be paired with any complete dry cat food as a complementary addition to their daily feeding regimen. Made with delicious, natural ingredients your cat will love, enhanced with vitamins & minerals, Applaws dry cat food contains everything your cat needs and wants for a complete & balanced diet. A Carefully crafted recipe that provides an excellent level of complex natural carbohydrates to help keep your cat healthy and active. The menu doesn't have to end there! Keep your purring pal playful with deliciously natural treats, made with only 1 ingredient, real protein! Happy, Healthy Cats are our specialty, you can truly trust the Natural Goodness in Applaws. At Applaws, we are dedicated to providing your purring pal with the finest nutrition while also making a positive impact on planet. We are proud to have achieved B Corp certification since 2021, a mark of distinction that reflects our commitment to operating as a responsible and ethical business. We believe in creating a positiveimpact not only on our consumers, but also on People, Pets and Planet.

name: Purina® Friskies Prime Filets Adult Cat Wet Food - Variety Pack, 5.5 Oz, 48 Count
description: Please your cat's palate with every meal when her dinners come from this Purina Friskies Prime Filets wet cat food variety pack. She'll always be excited at mealtime with four delectable Friskies cat food flavors to choose from, including With Beef in Gravy, With Ocean Whitefish and Tuna in Sauce, With Chicken in Gravy, and Turkey Dinner in Gravy. Each moist cat food recipe in this variety pack features savory morsels with real meat, seafood or poultry smothered in gravy or sauce for a palate–pleasing texture and a mouthwatering taste she can't get enough of. High–quality protein from tender, meaty, soft cat food chunks and plenty of added vitamins and minerals ensure that every meal in this pack is 100 percent complete and balanced for adult cats with no artificial colors or preservatives, so you can feel as good feeding her a nutritious meal as she is eating a delicious one. Make supper sensational by filling her tummy every day with this yummy Purina Friskies Prime Filets high protein cat food.

name: Temptations™ Bites In Gravy Adult Wet Cat Food - Variety Pack, Chicken and Seafood, 12 Ct, 42
description: You already enjoy giving your favorite feline Temptations brand treats, so give them more of what they want with Temptations wet cat food. The Seafood Medley and Tasty Chicken flavors your cat enjoys as a treat is a delicious meal made with real chicken or real salmon and shrimp flavors in a savory paté cat food. They'll enjoy the soft cat food with added moisture, which keeps them hydrated for playtime. Our wet cat food in gravy is made with high-quality protein to help support strong, healthy muscles for your furry friend. Each serving of wet cat food paté contains 35 essential vitamins, minerals, amino acids, including antioxidant Vitamin E, to help support their immune health. The tray allows for easy mealtime serving of the soft cat food in gravy with minimal waste. Don't forget to try Temptations purr-worthy treats available in multiple flavors and textures they'll love.

Made with real chicken as the first ingredient, this wet kitten food is formulated to help your new cat grow and play. The high–protein and grain–free recipe promotes healthy muscle development. And like all Blue Buffalo recipes, this Blue Buffalo kitten food contains no chicken (or poultry) by–product meals and no corn, wheat, or soy. Just healthy, natural ingredients your best friend will love.
